metadata.name: RenderMan 27 English-Chinese terminology
metadata.purpose: Terminology control for Codex-authored Chinese translation of RenderMan HTML documentation.
source_notes: Pixar RenderMan FAQ and Tech Specs identify XPU, RIS, MaterialX Lama, AOV, LPE, deep OpenEXR, Stylized Looks, RenderMan bridge products, and Tractor as product/technical terms.
MaterialX third-party support documentation identifies MaterialX, USD, Hydra, HdPrman, OSL, BSDF, and Lama as ecosystem terms.

RenderMan LamaHairChiang documentation and Chiang et al. Disney hair/fur research were used for R/TT/TRT/TRRT hair lobe, longitudinal/azimuthal roughness, albedo, and tube-like specular response terminology.
RenderMan 27 OSL Patterns documentation was used for OSL pattern, C++ Pattern, RIS builtin, XPU support, and LPE query terminology.

Open Shading Language 1.16 documentation and the ASWF OpenShadingLanguage repository were used for OSL shader, shader parameter, metadata, closure, SIMD, automatic differentiation, and shader network terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrAdjustNormal, PxrBump, and PxrNormalMap documentation was used for normal, bump, and surface-normal correction terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBump documentation was used for bump mapping, scalar displacement map, Input Bump, Filename texture lookup, Bump Manifold, MIPBias, MaxResolution, and resultN terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBumpManifold2D documentation was used for 2D manifold, UV/ST placement, Center/Angle/Scale/Offset, PrimVar, uvSet, and resultS/resultT terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrManifold2D and PxrManifold3D documentation were used for 2D/3D manifold placement, UVs, Pref/Po/P/__Pref/__WPref position modes, transform center/angle/frequency/offset/invert controls, Coordinate System/place3d, object/world space, warp controls, Jacobian filter/radius controls, uvSet, and result/resultS/resultT/resultX/resultY/resultZ terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrMatteID documentation was used for MatteID AOVs, RGB mattes, compositing mattes, per-object/per-material matte assignment, User Attributes, RenderMan globals Outputs, Matte Texture(s), utilityPattern[0], and resultAOV terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrMetallicWorkflow documentation was used for metallic specular workflows, Substance Painter/Designer/Mari application names, Base Color/Metallic/Specular PBR maps, index of refraction wording, PxrSurface/Lama connection guidance, and cross-DCC workflow terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrMix documentation was used for two-color mixing, mix percentage/formula wording, Color 1/Color 2, Mixer, Clamp Mixer, color1/color2 identifiers, and resultRGB/resultR/resultG/resultB outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrMultiTexture documentation was used for multi-texture slot workflows, compatible manifold nodes/resultMulti, Texture atlas limitations, RTX procedural texture plugins, multi-channel OpenEXR channel offsets, texture filtering/mip controls, randomization modes, bump/normal-map output, HexTile grid controls, and resultRGB/resultA output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRoundCube documentation was used for triplanar mapping/blended cube projection manifold terminology, PxrMultiTexture manifoldMulti/resultMulti connections, per-axis projection blending, Pref/Nref reference primvars, undisplaced-position behavior, random orientation/flip/offset controls, and axis-specific ST controls.

RenderMan 27 PxrPhasorNoise documentation and phasor/Gabor noise references were used for phasor wave, kernel, impulse, octave, Gabor mode, Gaussian falloff, phase alignment, direction jitter, filterScale, and amplitude-space terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrPrimvar documentation was used for GPrim primitive variables, primvars, Variable/Variable Name/Variable Type, Default Float, Verbosity, and result output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrVariable documentation was used for PxrVariable, GPrim primitive variables/primvars through pattern graphs, PxrPrimvar linkage, Variable Name/PrimVar/Type/Coordinate System parameters, built-in variable option labels, coordinate-system choices, and result RGB/result F/result F3 outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrVary documentation was used for PxrVary, controlled random variations, attribute/primvar-based variation sources, constant-detail primvar requirements, non-zero id/primvar/attribute values, Ri:Sides/varName debugging, Input Color/Vary Source/Variable Name/Hue/Saturation/Luminance/Gamma controls, centered/additive/subtractive modes, Seed, Scale Normalized Primvar, Verbosity, and resultRGB/resultR/resultG/resultB outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrVoronoise documentation, Inigo Quilez voronoise context, and Worley/Perlin noise references were used for PxrVoronoise, voronoise/Voronoi/noise blending, manifold domains, jitter, smoothness, cellnoise, Perlin-like noise, fractal octaves, turbulence, persistence/gain, lacunarity, filter size, Adjust Output controls, and resultF/resultRGB outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrWireframe documentation was used for PxrWireframe, geometry wireframe pattern assignment, material mixing, constant shader, flat texture, Wireframe Color/Background Color/Wireframe Opacity/Wireframe Width controls, opacity/visibility, width/thickness, and resultRGB output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrWorley documentation and Worley/Voronoi distance-noise references were used for PxrWorley, Worley noise, Surface Position, Current/Undisplaced Position, Frequency, cell size, Distance Metric, Euclidean/Euclidean Squared/Manhattan/Chebyshev/Minkowski metrics, Chessboard Distance, C1/C2, Jitter, Minkowski Exponent, Shape, Clamp Output, Invert, Random Scale, Random Scale Center, Manifold, Adjust Output, resultF, and resultRGB terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrProjectionLayer documentation was used for projected texture layers, PxrProjectionStack/PxrProjector workflows, channel packing, resultMask/outChannelsRGB outputs, filter enums, premultiplied alpha, and projection-window masking terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrProjectionStack documentation was used for compositing multiple PxrProjectionLayer nodes, layer activation modes, outChannelsRGB plugs, AOV channel routing, channelOut outputs, and outputChanIdx member terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrProjector documentation was used for camera/spherical/cylindrical/planar projection manifolds, coordinate-system transforms, Pref/Nref/WPref/WNref primvar workflows, resultMask projection masking, camera film-fit and clip-plane controls, planar clamp modes, and 2D manifold outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrPtexture documentation and the Ptex project overview were used for per-face texture files, default surface parameterization, __faceindex primvar lookup, Ptex reconstruction filters, mip interpolation, and sRGB/linear texture handling terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRadialDensity documentation was used for homogeneous-volume radial density falloff, gradient radius/density/exponent controls, start/stop positions, and object bounding-box coordinate defaults.

RenderMan 27 PxrRamp documentation was used for color ramp/gradient controls, Colors/Positions control points, spline interpolation, Spline Map and 1D manifold mapping, random object color selection, and resultRGB channel-output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrSplineMap documentation was used for Float Ramp/Color Ramp remapping, input/output range mapping, clamp input/output behavior, OutColor channel output labels, and color-component wording.

RenderMan 27 PxrRandomTextureManifold documentation was used for PxrMultiTexture random texture assignment, textureID primvar workflow, texture order modes, tiling modes, random source/extra seed controls, random orientation/flip/offset controls, Manifold 2D ST-domain controls, and Maya MEL textureID export terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRemap documentation was used for input/output range remapping, bias/gain tone adjustment, input/output clamping, inputMin/inputMax behavior, normalized gamma correction, and color-component wording.

RenderMan 27 PxrRGBtoNG documentation was used for RGB/shading-network to resultNG conversion, bump input connection wording, texture map/procedural pattern manipulation, and PxrBumpMixer workflow terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrShadedSide documentation was used for shaded-side detection, two-sided object shading, Invert parameter behavior, and PxrMix/Diffuse Color example terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrStylizedControl documentation was used for Random Type/Cam Depth Type, line albedo/thickness remap, sections map, hatching mask, triplanar projection inputs, inputPtriplanar/inputNtriplanar, and Triplanar Scale XYZ terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrSwitch documentation was used for PxrSwitch, Switch/Index/Inputs RGB, index-driven pattern-network evaluation, input ranges, user-attribute index assignment, PxrSurface/PxrAttribute linkage, and Float data type terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrTangentField documentation was used for tangent field, anisotropic direction, InputRotation/InputVector, grayscale/vector maps, nearest texture filtering, mip-mapping, resultXYZ, Bxdf Shading Tangent, txmake wrap mode, and sample texture terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrTee documentation was used for AOV export/debug workflow, inputRGB/inputF, resultRGB/resultF, camera-visible primary ray, active shading-network wiring, downstream Bxdf behavior, Verbosity modes, RIB DisplayChannel code, and example caption terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrTexture documentation was used for texture loading, manifold/domain behavior, UDIM/Mari/ZBrush/Mudbox atlas formats, Rtx procedural texture plugins, filename substitutions and image sequences, constant string primvar filename workflow, atlas styles, reconstruction filters, Linearize/sRGB, Adjust Output, Advanced Settings, and result channel outputs.

RenderMan 27 PxrThinFilm documentation and thin-film interference references were used for PxrThinFilm, thin-film interference, six spectral bands, Eta/index of refraction, Spread, Thickness, Thickness Scale, Front Only, front-facing points, nanometers, and resultRGB/resultR/resultG/resultB output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrThreshold documentation and image thresholding references were used for PxrThreshold, thresholding an input color pattern, black and white mask, falloff, transition width/profile, threshold value, channel modes, monochrome output, source typo tresholded, resultA, and alpha/RGB connection behavior.

RenderMan 27 PxrTileManifold documentation and texture mapping references were used for PxrTileManifold, st mapping coordinates, textured tiles over a 2D surface, repeating-pattern randomization, PxrMultiTexture-only workflow, tiled wooden floor and wood plank textures, grid/grout/tile bevel controls, random source/seed/orientation/flip/offset controls, Manifold 2D placement, multiManilfold source typo, odd tiles, grout mask, and Result/Result S/Result T/Result Multi/Result Mask output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrToFloat documentation and luminance/luma references were used for PxrToFloat, triple-float input, single-float output, index/channel selection, luminance and average modes, Input/Mode labels, Channel 0/1/2 enum labels, and resultF output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrToFloat3 documentation and RGB color model references were used for PxrToFloat3, single-float to triple/RGB conversion, input/inputR/inputG/inputB identifiers, Input R/G/B labels, R/G/B component wording, color conversion behavior, and resultRGB output terminology.

RenderMan 27 Lighting documentation was used for basic geometric lights, built-in analytic lights, light filters, Gobos/Cookies, analytic/mesh/emissive light categories, PxrDiskLight/PxrEnvDaylight/PxrPortalLight/PxrAOVLight, uniform scale notes, visible refraction/transmission settings, light linking, and bidirectional path tracing terminology.

RenderMan 27 Shadows documentation was used for shadow softness, Thin Shadows, Trace Light Paths, PxrPathTracer/PxrVCM/PxrUnified shadow behavior, caustics, photons, Allow Caustics, Guiding, Photon Guiding, Manifold Walk, and Shadow Falloff usage terminology.

RenderMan 27 Integrators documentation and path-tracing references were used for the RenderMan integrator system, main/production-quality integrators, radiance, light transport, unidirectional/bidirectional path tracing, direct/indirect lighting, light samples, environment lights, specular caustics, and specular-diffuse-specular light paths.

RenderMan 27 PxrPathTracer documentation and PBRT path-tracing references were used for final-quality integrator, forward path tracing, direct/indirect illumination sampling, Bxdf lobes, sampleMode bxdf/manual behavior, path guiding, Russian Roulette, path throughput, luminance clamping, caustic light paths, accumulated opacity, stochastic presence, continuation rays, and standard AOV channel terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrVCM documentation and the SIGGRAPH Asia 2012 Vertex Connection and Merging paper page were used for VCM, bidirectional path tracing, progressive photon mapping, vertex connection/merging, eye/light paths and vertices, photon maps, photon guiding, merge radius, time radius, volumetric photons, direct-sample reduction, and VCM parameter terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrUnified documentation, Using Manifold Walk documentation, Practical Path Guiding for Efficient Light-Transport Simulation, and VCM references were used for PxrUnified, Manifold Next Event Estimation, Manifold Walk, Indirect Guiding, RIS/PPG path guiding, SD-tree/spatial tree, traceLightPaths modes, UPS/VCM, photon controls, caustic clamps, diagnostic timers, and unified integrator parameter terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Integrators section, Pixar RenderMan Tech Specs, and local RenderMan 27 Integrators/PxrPathTracer/PxrUnified documentation were used for clampDepth, clampLuminance, noclamp;prefix, rouletteDepth, Russian roulette, camera ray hit points, indirect bounce, and geometric AOV terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Shading section, local RenderMan 27 Shading/PxrSurface/OSL Patterns documentation, and Open Shading Language standard-library documentation were used for OSL getattribute(), trace(), getmessage(), rendererInfo/context/global/attribute/primvar lookups, builtin attributes, diffuse albedo AOV, primvar binding order, shader ingestion, lobe normals, pattern network topology, and material-edit terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note MaterialX Lama section and local RenderMan 27 MaterialX Lama/LamaSurface/LamaSSS/LamaDielectric/LamaGeneralizedSchlick/LamaConductor/LamaIridescence documentation were used for Lama combiners, LamaSSS dmfp, albedoInversionMethod, Chiang mode, followTopology, sssSubset, utilityColor/utilityFloat/utilityInt, thin shadows, anisotropy, absorption/extinction, single scattering lobes, Tangent user lobes, mollified specular highlights, and parametric-direction curvature terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note PxrSurface section and local RenderMan 27 PxrSurface/PxrMatteID documentation were used for back diffuse transmit lobe, irradianceTint, lobe-specific bump normal inputs, diffuseBumpNormal, specularBumpNormal, bumpNormal, iridescenceFlip, diffuseDoubleSided, diffuse transmission, and PxrMatteID OSL node terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Patterns section and local RenderMan 27 Patterns/PxrDirt/PxrCurvature/PxrTee documentation were used for Patterns release-section wording, PxrDirt/PxrCurvature pattern support, PxrTee AOV export, and camera hits terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Subsurface section and local RenderMan 27 PxrSurface/Subsurface Scattering Parameters/PxrDisneyBsdf documentation were used for clearcoat, subsurface singlescatter, maxdiffusedepth, subsurfaceDmfp, subsurfaceDmfpColor, subsurfaceColor, scatterDistances, diffuse reflection approximation, subsurface response, extinction parameter, and glass lobe terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Glass and glass single scattering section and local RenderMan 27 Glass Parameters/Nested Dielectrics/LamaDielectric/LamaGeneralizedSchlick/PxrPathTracer documentation were used for thinGlass, thin glass, IOR behavior, outside IOR, nested dielectrics, intersectpriority, indexofrefraction, phantom hits, refractionGain, scatterColor, indirect/direct specular events, partial alpha, and refractive-surface terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Hair and Fur section and local RenderMan 27 LamaHairChiang/PxrMarschnerHair/PxrHairColor/Curves documentation were used for Hair and Fur release-section wording, PxrChiangHair, glowColor, glowGain, glow/gain parameters, hair/fur terminology, and backwards-compatible mode terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Texturing section, local RenderMan 27 PxrTexture/PxrPtexture/PxrMultiTexture/PxrHexTileManifold/txmake/OSL Patterns documentation, Open Shading Language standard-library documentation, and Ptex project documentation were used for texture/PTex cache, texture memory limits, dynamic texture-name tokens, OSL filter type, MIP map levels, hex tiling, texture wrap modes, ptexturemaxfiles, rendermn.ini, ptex cache, atlas-based texture cache, and non-square aspect-ratio terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Statistics section and local RenderMan 27 Stats in Katana/Live Stats documentation were used for statistics, direct illumination rays, ray counters, scene ingestion instrumentation, timers, scene loading, and wall-clock time terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 later Statistics release-note section, RenderMan 27 Configuration documentation, RenderMan 26 JSON Report and Configuration of Stats documentation, and local RenderMan 27 Stats in Katana/Live Stats in Solaris documentation were used for live stats, stats.ini, JSON Report, Listener plugins, stats metrics, stportal, timer/memory/counter UI labels, memory tracking, payload/metric structure, current/heap/maximum/peak memory naming, scene counters, and overview pane terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note RIS and XPU section, RenderMan 26 Sampling Modes, Checkpointing and Recovery, Sample and Display Filters, Arbitrary Output Variables, PxrAOVLight documentation, RenderMan 27 Cameras documentation, and local RenderMan 27/RFK27 pages were used for PixelVariance, adaptive metric, post-render summaries, AOV sample/display filter parameters, checkpoint timing, interactive denoising, LPE flicker, PxrAovLight excludeSubsurface, and screen-window camera terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 RIS release-note section, RenderMan 27 Renderer Options/Sampling Modes, and RenderMan 27 release-note text were used for RIS relativevariance/variance-v22 adaptive metric naming, DDC checkpointed deep-render files, sho/dsview viewing tools, OmnidirectionalStereo 180FOV/360FOV output modes, and PxrShadowDisplay/lpe shadow flag terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note RIS and XPU Volumes/Lighting/Shading section, local RenderMan 27 PxrVolume/PxrPortalLight/PxrMarschnerHair/PxrDisneyBsdf/PxrSurface/PxrVariable/PxrLayerBlend/PxrDispVectorLayer/PxrDispScalarLayer/OSL/PxrRoundCube/PxrBumpMixer/PxrManifold3D documentation, and RenderMan 26 rendermn.ini documentation were used for VDB boundary, emission focus, albedo, subsurfaceMult, subsurface closure, Exit Color, maximum bounces, material edits on hair, NaNs, layer operators, default OSL options, smoothRayDerivs, and transform-parameter terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Shading continuation, RenderMan 26 OSL Patterns, PxrDomeLight, PxrPathTracer, PxrNormalMap, PxrMultiTexture documentation, local RenderMan 27 PxrRoundCube/PxrTileManifold/PxrRandomTextureManifold documentation, and LamaGeneralizedSchlick references were used for trace-hit getmessage(), cameraVisibleAlpha, alpha contribution, accumOpacity, surface gradient/resultNG, invertBump, InvertT, non-hex manifold, look-breaking changes, and energyCompensation terminology.

RenderMan 27 Using Manifold Walk documentation and manifold-walk caustic references were used for Manifold Walk setup workflow, caustic-generating/receiving materials, eye-cornea/iris examples, mwStartable, mwWalkable, cheapCaustics, light exclude subsets, and PxrUnified manifoldWalk enablement terminology.

RenderMan 27 Cameras documentation was used for camera simulation, standard perspective/orthographic projections, motion blur, camera effects, Depth of Field, Bokeh, projection plugins, built-in projections, viewpoint-centered ray tracing, raytrace hider compatibility, and camera documentation link-title terminology.

RenderMan 27 Bokeh documentation was used for bokeh quality, out-of-focus blur, aperture and lens behavior, spherical aberration, diaphragm/aperture blades, aperture shape sides/angle/roundness/density controls, good/bad/neutral bokeh, blur circle, film plane, ellipse/circle of confusion, dofaspect, anamorphic-lens defocus blur, and tonemapping terminology.

RenderMan 27 Depth of Field documentation was used for aperture, image plane, stop/f-stop, shutter speed, exposure, depth of field, finite focus range, pinhole camera, fstop/focallength/focaldistance camera projection parameters, scene units, center of projection, plane of focus, lens aperture, focal length, and cinematographic depth-of-field terminology.

RenderMan 27 Shutter documentation was used for shutterOpenTime, shutterCloseTime, shutteropening RiCamera properties, RiShutter shutter intervals, shutter-normalized time, shutter opening/closing rates, opentime/closetime, fully open/fully closed states, motion-sample distribution, constant blur, fade-in/fade-out behavior, real camera shutter modeling, shutter acceleration/deceleration, parametric shutter-opening curves, axis-aligned rectangles, Bezier curve segments/control points, and shutter-opening curve aesthetics.

RenderMan 27 The Viewing Transformation documentation was used for viewing transformation, camera-to-screen and screen-to-raster projection, raster/output pixels, image resolution, output/display/framebuffer devices, pixel and frame aspect ratio, crop windows, screen coordinate system, camera-to-screen transformation, perspective/orthographic projections, screen window, viewing pyramid/box, field of view, off-center/anamorphic/stereo views, and RiDisplay/RiFormat/RiFrameAspectRatio/RiCropWindow/RiProjection/RiScreenWindow API terminology.

RenderMan 27 Projection Plugins documentation was used for RixProjection custom projection plugins, camera and lens projections, built-in projection plugins, depth of field and bokeh applicability to plugins, PxrCamera, PxrPanini, and full-featured projection plugin terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera documentation was used for real-world physical camera effects, PRMan perspective camera settings, shaped motion blur, bokeh, barrel distortion, chromatic aberration, split diopter, tilt-shift, vignetting, FOV/fov, prime lens conversion, F-stop, aperture size, focal length, focal distance, focal plane, DOF distortion, Camera Shutter, PxrCamera Advanced, and Enhance terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Aperture documentation was used for aperture shape controls, diaphragm blades, blur circle, highlight faceting, out-of-focus points, roundness, density, good/neutral/bad bokeh, ellipse/circle of confusion, dofaspect, anamorphic lens defocus blur, ray origins, enhance mode, focus factor, geometry tessellation, DOF-related blurring, and enhanced geometry-view terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Tilt-Shift documentation was used for tilt, roll, Focus 1/2/3, shiftX, shiftY, lens tilt, plane of focus, image plane, arbitrary focal plane, oblique planes, perspective distortion, keystone effects, vertical-line correction, and lens shifting terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Lens Distortion documentation was used for radial distortion, radial lens distortion coefficients, quadratic/quartic coefficients, pincushion/barrel distortion, asymmetric distortion X/Y, anamorphic squeeze, X/Y direction, horizontal/vertical line preservation, and image-caption squeeze values.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera DOF Distortion documentation was used for pivot center, center-of-frame, depth-of-field radial effect, squeeze center/strength/anamorph/falloff, circumference/radius squeeze directions, DOF multiplier, circle-of-confusion texture, and RIS/XPU support notes.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Split Diopter documentation was used for split-diopter lens shots, focal planes, number of split diopters, split-diopter line angle/offset/width, image-center normalized units, split-diopter axis, focal-distance interpolation, split-diopter regions, and world-space focal distance.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Chromatic Aberration documentation was used for transverse/lateral chromatic aberration, axial/longitudinal chromatic aberration, RGB primary magnification factors, chromatic focal shift, color tinge, image-edge fringing, bokeh color tinge, out-of-focus objects, and color noise.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Vignetting documentation was used for natural vignetting, optical vignetting, primary camera axis, wide-angle perspective behavior, blending intermediate values, lens hood/light blockage, additional lens elements, cat's eye bokeh, depth-of-field dependency, and image noise.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Camera Shutter documentation was used for shutter sweep direction, rolling shutter support, exposure duration, ideal rolling shutter, per-line instantaneous exposure, global shutter behavior, RIS/XPU support notes, and shutter-function cross-reference wording.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Advanced documentation was used for Detail Bias, Enhancement diagnostics, screen-area zooming, mipmap/dicing detail levels, ray zoom behavior, Matte File, deep EXR matte generation, ray termination, generalized clipping planes, Deep Data, shallow EXR alpha workflows, opacity/depth-based importance sampling, render masks, stochastic transparency sampling, and RIS/XPU support notes.

RenderMan 27 PxrCamera Enhance documentation was used for Disable DOF in enhance, disabling ray-origin modification, focus factor and geometry tessellation interactions, disabling sample distribution over time, motion factor, ray differentials, un-enhanced/enhanced images and pixels, checked/unchecked behavior, and enhanced pixel resolution wording.

RenderMan 27 PxrPanini documentation plus Panini/Pannini projection references were used for Panini Projection, wide field of view, FOV, compression amount, image periphery, interactive-render tweaking, redice/tessellate behavior, and 180/360-degree projection wording.

RenderMan 27 PxrBumpMixer documentation and the Surface Gradient-Based Bump Mapping Framework paper were used for resultNG, NG vector type, surface gradient, order-independent bump mixing, mask, amount, and mode terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBumpRoughness and txmake documentation was used for Bump Roughness, b2r texture conversion, roughness/anisotropy aggregation, Texture Manager, and Bump To Roughness terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrChecker documentation was used for checkerboard pattern, Color A/Color B, Dimensions, ST, and 2D/3D manifold terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrClamp documentation was used for clamp/clamped, Min/Max, RGB/color-channel, and resultRGB output terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrColorCorrect documentation was used for remapping, color correction, mask, input/output range, gamma, contrast, HSV, exposure stops, and clamp-output terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrColorGrade documentation was used for color grading, global/shadow/mid-tones/highlights controls, saturation/contrast/gamma/gain/offset, clamping, and range terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrColorSpace documentation and OpenColorIO terminology were used for OCIO spaces, ColorSpace, colorspace conversion, scene-linear, pre-converting textures, and render-time conversion terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrCross documentation was used for vector cross-product, perpendicular, normalized vector, Vector 1/2, Normalize Result, and resultXYZ/resultX/resultY/resultZ terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrCurvature documentation was used for curvature, convex/concave output, edge effects, sample distribution, trace set, bias/falloff, shaded point, and curvature-output terminology.
RenderMan 27 Trace Sets documentation was used for Trace Set/Trace Sets label preservation and inclusion/exclusion wording around traced rays.

RenderMan 27 PxrDirt documentation was used for ambient occlusion, occluded/unoccluded colors, camera hit points, sample distribution, falloff, surface-normal direction, bias direction, coordinate system, and trace group terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrOcclusion documentation and ambient occlusion references were used for PxrOcclusion, non-photorealistic integrator, physically based integrator occlusion behavior, ambient occlusion compositing passes, sample distributions, cosine/reflection sampling, Max Distance, Falloff, Use Albedo, and Num Samples terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrVisualizer documentation was used for PxrVisualizer, utility integrator, Interactive re-rendering, pretessellate, IPR/RfM update settings, wireframe and style parameters, matCap/material capture, Standard AOVs, world-space geometric outputs, and component channel terminology.

RenderMan 27 Rendering overview documentation and RenderMan background references were used for rendering workflow, quality tuning, Sampling/Filtering, Trace Depth, Interactive Rendering, Checkpointing and Recovery, diagnostics, Holdouts/Outputs, Baking, Nested Dielectrics, and Intersect Priority terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCryptomatte documentation and the Psyop Cryptomatte repository/specification were used for Cryptomatte, manifest, sidecar file, EXR header metadata, id/coverage pairs, matting, object/material selection, and compositing workflow terminology.

RenderMan 27 txmake documentation was used for txmake texture conversion, wrap/resize/filter/mipmap/environment-map/format/compression/data-type/channel/shadow-map/command-line options, OpenEXR/TIFF/Pixar texture formats, Bump To Roughness, b2r textures, and related command-line terminology.

RenderMan 27 Color Management documentation and OpenColorIO references were used for ACES, OCIO configurations, LINEAR-sRGB, Filmic Blender, BT.709/Rec.709, Scene Linear, RenderMan Image Tool/IT, color-managed values, rendering color space, Texture Manager, PxrColorSpace, and srgb_linear role terminology.

RenderMan 27 Custom OCIO Config documentation and OpenColorIO configuration-authoring references were used for config.ocio, OCIO roles, JSON configuration files, RenderMan color config files, search paths, environment variables, context variables, roles, displays/views, colorspaces, luma coefficients, ACEScg, Texture Manager conversion rules, txmake flags, and OCIO colorspace conversion parameter terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release notes, Pixar RenderMan What's New, Pixar RenderMan Tech Specs, VFX Reference Platform, and OpenImageIO maketx documentation were used for XPU production/final-frame rendering, interactive denoising, checkpointing, deep compositing, OpenEXR Deep IDs, Stylized Looks, OSL display/sample filters, mesh lights, MaterialX Lama early access, OpenImageIO/maketx texture conversion, VFX Reference Platform 2024, RIS maintenance/deprecation wording, bridge-product support, and RenderMan 27.0 release-note terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 Texturing release notes, RenderMan 27 Switching from txmake to OpenImageIO, RenderMan 27 PxrTexture/PxrBumpRoughness/txmake documentation, and OpenImageIO maketx documentation were used for OpenImageIO backend, Texture Manager default formats, ACES-compliant texture conversion, maketx metadata/tile/resize requirements, UDIM token capitalization, zip compression, non-tiled OpenEXR, PixarTextureFormat metadata, and user max texture-resolution/mip-bias attributes.

RenderMan 27 PxrDispScalarLayer documentation was used for scalar displacement layering, layer gain/mask/operation labels, Add/Over/Multiply/Average/Min/Max operation wording, and resultF float-output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrDispTransform documentation was used for displacement type, scalar/vector displacement input, vector space, Mudbox/ZBrush vector displacement, displacement remapping, height/depth/center/scale space, displacement direction, and resultXYZ terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrDispVectorLayer documentation was used for vector displacement layering, Base/Layer Vector labels, vector/color result outputs, vector component operation wording, resultXYZ/resultRGB, and PxrDisplace Vector Displacement terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrDot documentation was used for dot product, vector magnitude/direction, perpendicular vectors, fresnel/curvature effects, electron microscope style, result, and single-component float output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrEnvGround, PxrDomeLight, and PxrBumpMixer documentation were used for environment-ground look-development workflow, HDRI/OpenEXR environment lighting, ground geometry material, placement/projection controls, ResultRGB/Result Presence/ResultNG outputs, and Normal/Bump connection terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRectLight documentation was used for rectangular area light behavior, softbox/fluorescent/panel use cases, non-physical controls, light intensity/exposure/color/temperature parameters, primary visibility, emission focus, diffuse/specular amount controls, near-distance controls, cone/IES profile controls, shadow falloff controls, trace subsets, photon tracing, thin shadow, manifold walk, light samples, light groups, and importance multiplier terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrEnvDayLight documentation and the cited Preetham/Shirley/Smits daylight model and Hottel solar transmittance references were used for physical daylight simulation, terrestrial daylight, sky model, solar disk, turbidity/haziness, limb darkening, zenith/horizon, virtual ground plane, sun/sky tint, and local solar-position terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrSphereLight documentation was used for point and spherical light sources, uniform scaling, one-sided sphere-light illumination, directional emission markers, cone visibility, physical falloff, near-distance controls, virtual flaps, IES profile scaling/normalization, Normalize, and highlight-size terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrMeshLight documentation was used for arbitrary-shaped mesh lights, emissive geometry, render visibility, PxrBlack, Texture Color, Area Normalize, texture-driven mesh lighting, and mesh-light sampling controls.

RenderMan 27 PxrDistantLight documentation was used for infinite/distant light behavior, sun/moon source wording, parallel light rays, Angle Extent, infinite-distance visibility, and distant-light shadow controls.

RenderMan 27 PxrPortalLight documentation and the Portal-Masked Environment Map Sampling paper title were used for portal light, parent dome light, portal name, environment map sampling, interior-lighting, and bridge-application interface terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrAOVLight documentation was used for AOV mask, utility light, shot-specific mask, DisplayChannel/Display setup, primary-hit/refraction/reflection mask, Adapt All, volume-boundary, and throughput terminology.

RenderMan 27 Light Filters documentation was used for Light Filters, stencil/gel lighting controls, photon-emission notes for PxrVCM/PxrUnified, deprecated Gobo/Blocker wording, cookie/rod replacements, intensity/exposure multiplication, barn-door/window-barn controls, painted texture projection, and ramp light-filter terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrBarnLightFilter documentation was used for barn modes, physical vs analytic barn behavior, orthographic and apex projection, shear controls, use-light-direction behavior, inner barn region, edge and soft-edge sizing, pre-barn effects, density falloff/interpolation, combine modes, and grey-scale light-filter terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrCookieLightFilter documentation was used for cookie projection, stained-glass physical mode, analytic blur/falloff controls, projected texture maps, alpha-channel blur masks, fill color, texture tile modes, U/V inversion/scale/offset controls, premultiplied alpha, blur and density interpolation controls, saturation/contrast/tint controls, and combine-mode grouping.

RenderMan 27 PxrGoboLightFilter documentation was used for gobo texture projection, PxrCookieLightFilter relationship, projected texture maps, alpha-channel blur masks, fill color, tile modes, U/V scale and offset controls, premultiplied Alpha behavior, diffuse/specular contribution multipliers, and combine-mode grouping.

RenderMan 27 PxrIntMultLightFilter documentation was used for intensity/exposure multiplication, light-linking isolated asset workflows, viewer-guiding light intensity, Exposure multiplier control, diffuse/specular contribution amounts, color saturation multiplier behavior, Tint, and always-multiplied combine mode terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRampLightFilter documentation was used for ramp-driven light control, artistic light decay, ramp direction/type modes, distToLight/linear/spherical/radial ramps, begin/end distance controls, ramp knots/floats/colors/interpolation arrays, projected effect controls, diffuse/specular contribution multipliers, and always-multiplied combine mode terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrRodLightFilter documentation was used for rod/blocker light filtering, irregular blocker shapes, inner rod box dimensions, front/back/left/right/top/bottom region controls, edge scaling, intensity/density/invert multipliers, diffuse/specular contribution controls, falloff ramp transitions from core to edge, optional color gradients, and combine-mode grouping.

RenderMan 27 PxrExposure documentation was used for exposure adjustment, stops, input color/inputRGB, intensity doubling/halving, gain comparison, perceptually linear behavior, and Stops parameter terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrFacingRatio documentation was used for facing ratio, camera direction/vector, surface/shading/bump normals, Face Forward, Clamp/Invert, Ior/Gamma mode, dielectric-surface simulation, and resultF single-component output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrFlakes, PxrManifold3D, and PxrSurface documentation were used for metallic flake paint, bumped normals, flake randomness/frequency/density/size/jitter, Validate Normals, Match C++ patterns, __Pref/reference-position manifold workflow, and resultN/resultA output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrFractal and PxrManifold3D documentation were used for fractal texture, texture-style node, 2D placement, 3D projection, Current/Undisplaced Position, noise layers, Frequency, Lacunarity, Dimension, Erosion, Variation, modeOp, Adjust Output, and resultF/resultRGB terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrGamma documentation was used for gamma adjustment, input color/inputRGB, midtones, black/white unaffected behavior, and resultRGB/resultR/resultG/resultB terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrGeometricAOV documentation was used for deprecated geometric AOV node wording and the replacement AOV/LPE workflow through Integrators.

RenderMan 27 PxrGrid documentation was used for procedural rectangular/hexagonal grid pattern, tile width/height/shift, border thickness, tile/border colors, brick-like layout, and Manifold utility terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrHexTileManifold and PxrMultiTexture documentation were used for Hex Tiling, PxrMultiTexture connection, Grid/Texture Frequency, Blend Width/blendWidth, Burley exponentiated blending, jitter offsets, and custom rotation/orientation terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrHSL documentation was used for HSL hue/saturation/value adjustment, RGB color space output, Input Color, Luminance, and resultRGB channel terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrInvert documentation was used for color-component inversion, RGB/HSL/HSV color models, Color Model/inputColor, Invert Channel 0/1/2, clamped RGB output, and resultRGB channel terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrLayeredBlend and PxrBlend documentation were used for layered blending, up to 8 layers, top/bottom/background/base layer ordering, Enable/Operation/Color/Alpha [x] controls, Background Color/Alpha, Clamp Output, alpha channel, and resultRGB terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrLayeredTexture, PxrTexture, PxrBakeTexture, and PxrManifold2D documentation were used for layered texture masking, texture overlay/compositing chain wording, atlas/_MAPID_/UDIM tile naming, texture lookup, mip/filter controls, Linearize, Color Tint/Offset, and resultRGB/resultA channel terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrHairColor and PxrMarschnerHair documentation plus the cited EGSR 2011 hair reflectance paper were used for melanin concentration, hair fibers, physical/artistic hair-color modes, dye, stray hair, hairIndexPrimvar, random pivot/seed, and PxrMarschnerHair connection terminology.
Pixar RenderMan Fundamentals - Patterns was used for PxrDirt/PxrCurvature procedural grime context.
RenderMan 27 PxrArithmetic documentation was used for arithmetic pattern, operation, and non-destructive value-edit terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrAttribute documentation and RenderMan DCC attribute examples were used for attribute, namespace, variable type, RiAttribute, Maya, Katana, and Houdini user-attribute terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBakePointCloud and Baking documentation was used for point-cloud baking, PTC/Ptex, coordinate-system, and ptxmake terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBakeTexture documentation was used for texture baking, atlas texture, UDIM/MARI/Mudbox/ZBrush tile naming, reconstruction filters, file formats, mipmap, and primvar terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBlackBody documentation and black-body radiation references were used for black body, color temperature, kelvin, physical intensity, exposure, and channel-output terminology.

RenderMan 27 PxrBlend documentation and Adobe Photoshop blend-mode descriptions were used for blend mode, base/blend color, top/bottom layer, alpha compositing, luminance, hue, saturation, and Photoshop-style blend-mode enum terminology.
RenderMan 27 PxrBlenderPrincipledInputs documentation and Blender Principled BSDF documentation were used for Blender/Cycles Principled BSDF to Lama Shading Network conversion terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Geometry section, RenderMan 27 Curves/Subdivision Surfaces local documentation, and Pixar OpenSubdiv technology-library documentation were used for minwidth, offscreenmultiplier, nested instances, instance inheritance, material bindings, displacement shading, semi-sharp creases, face/vertex normals, offscreen dicing, OpenSubdiv, and micropolygon filtering terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Volumes section, RenderMan 27 Volumes/Aggregate Volumes local documentation, RenderMan 26 PxrVolume, and RenderMan aggregate-volume cloud-rendering documentation were used for interior volume aggregates, Lama combiner networks, RiVolume/PxrVolume behavior, homogeneous volumes, volume scattering approximation, VDB/non-VDB heterogeneous volumes, dsominmax, volume shadowing, voxelinterpolation, nearest-neighbor/jitter/trilinear interpolation, and volume lookup terminology.

RenderMan 27.0 release-note Lighting section, Pixar RenderMan What's New and Tech Specs pages, and local RenderMan 27 Lighting/Light Filters/PxrPathTracer/PxrRectLight/PxrEnvGround/Shadows documentation were used for light filters, falloff and color splines, ramp points, sticky light parameters, direct lighting, HDRI maps, light paint textures, radiance estimates, IES profiles, shadow falloff, semi-opaque presence, and ModifyLightInstance terminology.
Local RenderMan 27 documentation frequency scan was used to prioritize entries.

rules: RenderMan product names, renderer names, node names, API identifiers, file paths, environment variables, and UI labels with exact spelling must be preserved unless the glossary gives a Chinese rendering.
First occurrence of an important English technical acronym may use Chinese explanation plus acronym, e.g. '任意输出变量（AOV）'; subsequent occurrences may use the acronym.
Do not translate identifiers beginning with Pxr, Rix, Ri:, RfM, RfH, RfK, RfB, PRMan, RMAN, RMANTREE, or node/operator names from DCC applications.
Translate explanatory prose naturally, but keep command-line examples, code blocks, attribute names, parameter names, JSON keys, and file extensions unchanged.
Prefer established CG/VFX Chinese terminology: 渲染, 着色, 材质, 纹理, 采样, 积分器, 光路, 合成, 置换, 体积, 次表面散射, 法线, 反照率, 噪声, 降噪.

Open Shading Language; first occurrence may be 开放着色语言（OSL）.
Arbitrary Output Variable; first occurrence may be 任意输出变量（AOV）.
Light Path Expression; first occurrence may be 光路表达式（LPE）.
Common CG/VFX shorthand; can explain as 外观开发.
